promptJson.stem: Which choice completes the text with the most logical transition?
promptJson.passage: The team finished the prototype ahead of schedule. ____ they began user testing the following week.

explanationJson.summary: The second sentence gives a result of finishing early, so a cause-effect or result transition fits.
explanationJson.whyCorrect: Therefore signals that user testing follows as a consequence of the timeline described.
steps: Link sentence 1 to sentence 2 as consequence, not contrast or similarity.
